permanent_exceptions.exception_reason: PARA shareholder election and proration alternatives are mutually exclusive.
Twenty-First Century Fox Class B holders were subject to Disney cash-or-stock elections and proration, so no single fixed cash-and-stock lifecycle action can represent every holder's consideration.
Twenty-First Century Fox Class A holders were subject to Disney cash-or-stock elections and proration, so no single fixed cash-and-stock lifecycle action can represent every holder's consideration.

Legacy NE shares were cancelled or exchanged under the 2021 reorganization and holders received pro-rata Tranche 3 Warrants with nonzero, path-dependent value that cannot be represented as a zero-cash delisting.
TWC shareholder elections and proration produced multiple consideration paths.
Legacy DO shares were cancelled under the 2021 reorganization and holders received pro-rata Emergence Warrants with nonzero, path-dependent value that cannot be represented as a zero-cash delisting.
AABA multi-stage liquidation distributions are not one terminal cash event.
Legacy DNR shares were cancelled under the 2020 reorganization and holders received pro-rata Series B Warrants with nonzero, path-dependent value that cannot be represented as a zero-cash delisting.
GGP cash-stock elections and proration are not one fixed consideration row.
BRCM cash-stock elections and proration are not one fixed consideration row.
FRC entered FDIC receivership on 2023-05-01; stockholders remain the last-priority class and the active receivership has no final per-share recovery.
Legacy VAL interests ceased after the 2021 reorganization and holders received warrants with nonzero, path-dependent value that cannot be represented as a zero-cash delisting.
CELG consideration included a separately tradable contingent value right.

prices.adjustment_basis: Yahoo indicators.quote raw OHLCV is used; indicators.adjclose is never used. For each regime bounded only by stored EODHD split/capital-reduction/ stock-dividend events, the Yahoo/EODHD close ratio must be stable before its median scale may normalize OHLC. Every overlapping session is then checked; an unstable regime is a mismatch, never silently rescaled.
prices.currency_basis: Both EODHD and Yahoo chart metadata must explicitly declare USD. A missing or different Yahoo currency is a mismatch and cannot be excepted.

provider.name: yahoo_chart
provider.stability_note: Yahoo's chart endpoint is unofficial and has no API SLA. One-attempt collection and immutable exact-byte raw response caches are mandatory.
provider.use_restriction: Yahoo chart data is permitted here only for the owner's personal, non-commercial use. The repository and R2 bucket must remain private and cached responses or derived Yahoo data must not be redistributed.
